name: Uzertas Boya Sanayi Ticaret ve Yatirim A.S.
summary: Uzertas Boya Sanayi Ticaret ve Yatirim A.S. operates in the paint industry in Turkey. It provides paints, varnishes, water repellent products, color enhancers, floor protectors, wallpaper glues, paint covers, silicones, sandpapers, and brush and roller products, as well as concrete and wood floor and surface cleaners. The company also offers iron oxide powder paints, sanders, protective covers, insulation materials, marine and yacht paints, antifouling paints, gilding paints, wallpaper adhesives, optima glue, technological paint application systems, construction paints, and isolation materials. It markets and sells its products under the Beeck, Beeck SP Plus, Bondex, Pozzi-Colors, Nu-Guard AG, Incralac, and Aries brands. The company was formerly known as Uzer Koll. Sti. and changed its name to Uzertas Boya Sanayi Ticaret ve Yatirim Anonim Sirketi in 1972. Uzertas Boya Sanayi Ticaret ve Yatirim A.S. was founded in 1962 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
